title: Playmobil 71237 Country Horse Transporter, pony Farm, Horse Toys, Fun Imaginative Role-Play, Playset Suitable for Children Ages 4+
features: Fun to collect, combine and play: PLAYMOBIL PLAYMO-FRIENDS Mother with Baby Carrier with accessories for creating your own adventures
Space for up to two horses and 2 beds for the accompanying figures
Playset for children for children ages 4+, Ideal for children's hands due to age-appropriate size and easy to hold thanks to the rounded edges
Can be used every day: instructions for setting up with parents, High quality and robust design, Clean the parts (without stickers) under running water without chemical agents
Contents: 47-piece play figure set with instructions: 1 horse transporter, 1 figure, 1 horse, 44 accessories, material: plastic, LxDxH transporter: 27 x 13 x 14.5 cm, weight: 549 g, 71237
description: From the manufacturer Explore the exciting world of animals and promote creativity with fun games PLAYMOBIL Country Horse Transporter with Trainer Animal-loving kids from the age of 4 will be thrilled with this PLAYMOBIL playset. The richly detailed toy set contains everything horse fans need to experience countless imaginative riding adventures, such as a horse transporter, riding utensils and, of course, a horse. The spacious horse transporter offers enough room for two PLAYMOBIL figures and has many exciting features such as a fold-out ramp, a trailer coupling and roof inserts for removal. For transport, the horse is led into the vehicle interior via the side ramp. Riding gear and transport box can be stowed in the trunk. Should the excursion take longer, there are two sleeping berths above the trunk area. Explore the world of PLAYMOBIL Country PLAYMOBIL Country is a creative role-playing game with a thematic reference and numerous possibilities. Creative play figures with a friendly smile - this is what characterises the PLAYMOBIL figures that have been delighting children all over the world for decades. Numerous professions and theme worlds offer a wide range of possibilities and ensure long-lasting play fun. The colourful world of PLAYMOBIL Country Horse Riding If you prefer a horse farm instead of a country farm, you will find huge variety of different play sets in the PLAYMOBIL Country series. Lovingly designed pony farms offer enough space for stables and an extensive outdoor area. A car with pony trailer is available for transporting the ponies and the small Country Pony Café can even be purchased to complement the pony farm. At a glance: Horse toy suitable for children ages 4+ 47-piece play figure set: 1 Horse Transporter, 1 Trainer, 1 Horse, 44 accessories PLAYMOBIL Country sets inspire creative storytelling The roof sections can be detached With assembly instructions High quality (Made in Europe) Country Never a dull moment with PLAYMOBIL Country: long rides, adventurous tournaments or spoiling care treatments in the stable at home. There's lots to discover and explore around the PLAYMOBIL farm and the PLAYMOBIL pony farm. The four-legged friends have to be taken to the show with the PLAYMOBIL horse transporter. And the other PLAYMOBIL animals also need to be looked after. The PLAYMOBIL tractor has just loaded hay and is on its way! The detailed design of the numerous individual parts brings the varied everyday life of the farm directly into the children's room. The next riding adventure is coming This lovingly designed 47-piece PLAYMOBIL play figure set includes a PLAYMOBIL rider, a sport horse, a horse transporter, horse utensils and other great extras. The riding helmet can be removed. This feature-packed PLAYMOBIL Country toy can be given as a birthday present, holiday gift or special occasion treat for kids who love horses or realistic vehicle models. Let your trip begin With space for the horses, which are led into the vehicle over the ramp, which itself can be folded out at the sides. The roof sections can be detached (boot doors must be open). With two sleeping spaces for figures and lots of accessories. Everything you need for your trip Experience many exciting riding adventures with the Playmobil rider and her sport horse. Join them on numerous tournaments and win some riding trophies. 71237 Horse Transporter with Trainer 71241 Horse Veterinarian 71243 Horse with Foal 71239 Picnic Adventure with Horses 71238 Riding Stable 71242 Riding Lessons Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 661 4.7 out of 5 stars 426 4.8 out of 5 stars 668 4.7 out of 5 stars 234 4.8 out of 5 stars 254 4.8 out of 5 stars 259 Price — no data — no data £10.77 £ 10 . 77 £31.96 £ 31 . 96 £69.00 £ 69 . 00 £15.99 £ 15 . 99 Description The detailed toy set makes everyone's horse fans dream come true to experience countless riding adventures, such as a horse transporter, riding accessories and of course a horse. Support the vet in caring for the horses with the PLAYMOBIL horse vet set. With the help of the mobile X-ray machine, the doctor takes pictures of the injured horse's foot. Are there still boxes free at the PLAYMOBIL riding stables? Then this horse with foal should definitely move in. The two lovingly designed toy horses invite children to imaginative riding adventures. There's happiness on four hooves with the Picnic Adventure with Horses from PLAYMOBIL! After a long ride across meadows and fields, riders make themselves comfortable on the blanket and enjoy a delicious picnic. Get into the riding fun with the lovely PLAYMOBIL play set Riding Stable! This detailed play figure set will delight all horse fans. In the horse box, caring children can look after the beloved horse and the cute foal. Great fun for horse fans with the great PLAYMOBIL play set Riding Lessons. In the training paddock, the riding instructor practices jumping with her student. The three poles are stacked on top of each other to form a jumping platform. For children ages 4+ 4+ 4+ 4+ 4+ 4+ Scope of delivery Figures: 1 rider; animals: 1 horse; accessories: 1 horse transporter, 1 saddle, 1 halter, 1 saddle blanket, 1 transport box,1 changing saddle, 1 thermos flask, 1 cup, 1 riding helmet Figures: veterinary surgeon, woman; animals: horse; accessories: 1 mobile X-ray machine, 1 storage table, 1 computer, 1 microscope, 3 X-rays, 1 stethoscope, 1 veterinary case, 1 bucket, 1 set of operating instruments, 1 trimmer, 1 cream, 1 spray Figures: 1 woman; animals: 1 horse, 1 foal; accessories: 2 halters, 1 rein, 1 bucket, 2 carrots Figures: 1 woman, 1 man, 1 boy; animals: 2 horses, 1 pony, 1 dog, 1 duck, 3 baby ducks, 2 squirrels; accessories: 1 apple tree, 1 pond, 1 water lily, 1 fence, 1 flower meadow, 2 helmets, 1 child's helmet, 2 saddles, 3 halters, 2 reins, 5 apples Figures: 1 rider, 1 boy; animals: 1 horse, 1 colt; accessories: 1 riding stable with fence, 1 flower box, 1 bucket, 1 box, 4 bandages, 1 feed rake, 1 broom, 1 pitchfork, 3 greens, 3 flower tendrils, 1 straw insert, 1 horse droppings, 1 towel Figures: 1 rider, 1 riding instructor; animals: horse; accessories: 3 cavaletti jumps, 1 fence, 1 flower meadow, 1 horse blanket, 1 saddle, 1 halter, 1 rein, 1 rake, 1 shovel, 1 horse droppings, 1 storage box, 1 curry comb set, 1 riding helmet Number of parts Total 47 52 11 67 136 37
